name: San Joaquin Glamour Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the cabbage and remove any blemished leaves.
2. Cut a stem at the bottom to create an even base.
3. Cut out the center of the cabbage, but keep a solid shell that will not leak.
4. Remove stems from the figs.
5. Process the scooped-out cabbage through a food grinder using the coarse blade.
6. Add all remaining ingredients except the cream to the grinder and mix lightly.
7. Whisk the heavy cream and gently fold it into the salad.
8. Spoon the mixture into the cabbage shell, heaping high.
9. Garnish with additional stewed figs and small lettuce leaves.
10. Adjust seasoning as desired for serving 5 or 6 people.
